units: Metric-specific: JavaScript/CSS use gzip level 9 bytes, media/fonts use response transfer bytes, and WebGL uses a context-request count.

metricDefinitions.totalInitialJavaScriptGzipBytes: Deduplicated JavaScript requested during a cold production navigation at the named viewport and the 3,000 ms pre-intent observation window.
metricDefinitions.manifestInitialJavaScriptGzipBytes: Deduplicated Next root runtime and route entry JavaScript declared by the production build.
metricDefinitions.runtimeJavaScriptGzipBytes: Next rootMainFiles from the production build manifest.
metricDefinitions.sharedJavaScriptGzipBytes: Initial JavaScript shared by the runtime, layouts, and other non-route-owned entries.
metricDefinitions.routeOwnedJavaScriptGzipBytes: JavaScript unique to the selected route page entry after shared entries are removed.
metricDefinitions.lazyJavaScriptGzipBytes: Route react-loadable JavaScript that is not declared in the initial manifest set.
metricDefinitions.preIntentAdditionalJavaScriptGzipBytes: Cold-navigation JavaScript requested before user intent even though it is outside the declared initial manifest set.
metricDefinitions.postTriggerAdditionalJavaScriptGzipBytes: Local Next build JavaScript first requested during the bounded explorer near/intent settle window after subtracting the complete cold-navigation build set.
metricDefinitions.postTriggerUnexpectedFailedRequestCount: Unexpected transport failures first observed after the explorer near/intent trigger.
metricDefinitions.postTriggerHttpErrorResponseCount: HTTP error responses first observed after the explorer near/intent trigger.
metricDefinitions.postTriggerPageErrorCount: Uncaught page errors first observed after the explorer near/intent trigger.
metricDefinitions.postTriggerEnhancementStateMismatchCount: Whether the explorer failed to reach the deterministic ready/static state and controller count expected for the measured viewport after the trigger settle window.
metricDefinitions.nonBuildJavaScriptTransferBytes: Successful script response bytes outside the local Next build asset graph, including same-origin runtime services and third-party scripts.
metricDefinitions.cssGzipBytes: Deduplicated CSS requested by the cold production navigation.
metricDefinitions.initialMediaTransferBytes: Image and media response bytes requested during the cold pre-intent observation window.
metricDefinitions.largestImageTransferBytes: Largest single image response in the cold pre-intent observation window.
metricDefinitions.initialFontTransferBytes: Font response bytes requested during the cold pre-intent observation window; reported separately from the JavaScript budget.
metricDefinitions.webglContextRequests: Calls requesting a WebGL or WebGL2 canvas context during the cold pre-intent observation window.
metricDefinitions.unexpectedFailedRequestCount: Failed network requests not matched by the route's explicit temporary allowlist.
metricDefinitions.httpErrorResponseCount: Subresource responses with an HTTP status of 400 or greater.
metricDefinitions.pageErrorCount: Uncaught page errors observed during the cold pre-intent window.

v2.description: Approved Personal Field Notes V2 ceilings. They protect the public editorial archive from returning to heavy, speculative interactions.
